description: Clarity AI provides extra-financial intelligence and sustainability data products for financial institutions and other organizations. Its platform covers areas such as climate, ESG risk, EU taxonomy, SFDR, portfolio analytics, widgets, and data feeds.
summary: Clarity AI exposes a REST API at `https://api.clarity.ai/clarity/v1` authenticated via a user-generated API key/secret exchanged at `/oauth/token`, plus a known MCP server at `https://clarity-sfdr20-mcp.pro.clarity.ai/mcp` with undetermined auth.
